title: Cobblemon Anime Cries Soundpack
body:
---

## ☕ Support the Project

This soundpack is something I work on in my free time — and each Pokémon cry takes time to source, clean, and integrate properly.

If you’d like to support the project, you can do so here:
👉 https://buymeacoffee.com/zendevve

Support doesn’t just help development — it also lets you **request specific Pokémon cries** to be added to the pack.

I can’t guarantee turnaround times, but I do prioritize supported requests when working on updates.

No pressure though. Even just sharing the project or contributing sounds helps a ton 🙌

---
